atlas.put_in: N phase-offset sinusoids + an overdamped rotor torque (rotating / pulsing + ratchet bias)
emerged: three-phase current sum max|.| = 0.0 (balanced); triplen zero-seq harmonics = [3, 6, 9]
rotor net revolutions: three-phase 19.008, single-phase 0.044, single+ratchet 19.054
surprises: three is the MINIMUM equally-spaced phase set whose field rotates; a single-phase field needs the ratchet's broken symmetry to pick a direction
atlas.persistence: the rotating field self-starts a fixed direction; the pulsing field only wobbles
atlas.not_scripted_check: no spin direction is put in; the rotor's net revolutions are measured
atlas.claim_tier: measured (rotation, balance, triplen, rev) ; interpretive (rotation built from three balanced phases) ; analogy (three-phase heart / ATP synthase)
floors: idealized sinusoids + overdamped rotor; absolute revolutions depend on (K, T, dt, D)
the ripple<0.05-iff-N>=3, zero balance, triplen offset, and rev sign/size are gated, not the magnitude
'heart / ATP synthase' is a KNOWN MATCH analogy, not a biological claim
